name: OFI-1 Closing Imbalance
hypothesis: Extreme top-of-book imbalance (obi_1 > 0.9) during the pre-closing period (last 40 mins) is a strong predictor of continued upward drift as positions are closed out. This tests the regime-dependence noted in iter008_obi1_gt_099_h50 by isolating a specific time-based regime.
mutation_note: Based on feedback that iter008_obi1_gt_099_h50 was regime-dependent, this spec combines a high OBI-1 threshold with a time-of-day filter for the pre-closing session, exploring a specific, well-defined market regime.
